about.title: We Build Software
about.p1: We are a team of engineers, designers, and strategists passionate about building software that solves real problems and drives measurable business outcomes.
about.p2: From MVP to enterprise-scale platforms, we partner with startups and Fortune 500 companies alike to deliver clean, robust, and future-proof technology.
about.mission: We don't just write code — we engineer solutions that outlast trends and scale with your ambitions.
about.valuesDesc: The principles we live by in every line of code and every client conversation

timeline.title: Founded
timeline.desc: Started as a 3-person consultancy with one mission: build software that actually works.

timeline.title: First Big Win
timeline.desc: Landed our first Fortune 500 client and grew to a team of 10 engineers in under 12 months.

timeline.title: Remote First
timeline.desc: Transitioned to a fully distributed team — ahead of the curve — without missing a single deadline.

timeline.title: Series A
timeline.desc: Raised $4M seed to expand our engineering division and launch our Cloud & AI practice.

timeline.title: 100 Projects
timeline.desc: Delivered our 100th production project. Zero critical post-launch failures.

timeline.title: Platform V2
timeline.desc: Launched Quantumexe Platform 2.0 — our internal toolchain now powering 30+ client deployments.

timeline.title: Award Winner
timeline.desc: Named Best Tech Agency at Dev Summit. The team surprised us with a standing ovation.

timeline.title: 200+ Projects
timeline.desc: Crossed 200 delivered projects and 50 engineers strong. The journey is just getting started.
